query:
DELETE pv FROM page_views pv
INNER JOIN (
  SELECT MIN(id) as keep_id, sessionKey
  FROM page_views
  GROUP BY sessionKey
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
) dups ON pv.sessionKey = dups.sessionKey AND pv.id != dups.keep_id;
